SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-27-2017 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO APR-27-2017 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF JOEL SYMMES IS PRESENT. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT MOHAMMAD WAQAR.
